info.title: Container Registry Client CLI
info.description: CLI for executing commands on a container registry's HTTP API.

hookCapture.patchTarget: ProcessExit-fallback (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

commands.name: image
commands.description: Commands related to container images

commands.name: compare
commands.description: Compares two images

commands.name: layers
commands.description: Compares two images by layers

arguments.name: base
arguments.description: Name of the base container image (<image>, <image>:<tag>, or <image>@<digest>)

arguments.name: target
arguments.description: Name of the target container image (<image>, <image>:<tag>, or <image>@<digest>)

commands.name: files
commands.description: Compares two images by their files

arguments.name: base
arguments.description: Name of the base container image (<image>, <image>:<tag>, or <image>@<digest>)

arguments.name: target
arguments.description: Name of the target container image (<image>, <image>:<tag>, or <image>@<digest>)

commands.name: inspect
commands.description: Return low-level information on a container image

arguments.name: image
arguments.description: Name of the container image (<image>, <image>:<tag>, or <image>@<digest>)

commands.name: os
commands.description: Gets OS info about the container image

arguments.name: image
arguments.description: Name of the container image (<image>, <image>:<tag>, or <image>@<digest>)

commands.name: save-layers
commands.description: Saves an image's extracted layers to disk

arguments.name: image
arguments.description: Name of the container image (<image>, <image>:<tag>, or <image>@<digest>)

commands.name: dockerfile
commands.description: Generates a Dockerfile that represents the image

arguments.name: image
arguments.description: Name of the container image (<image>, <image>:<tag>, or <image>@<digest>)

commands.name: manifest
commands.description: Commands related to manifests

commands.name: get
commands.description: Queries a manifest

commands.name: digest
commands.description: Queries the digest of a manifest

commands.name: resolve
commands.description: Resolves a manifest to a target platform's fully-qualified image digest

arguments.name: image
arguments.description: Name of the container image (<image>, <image>:<tag>, or <image>@<digest>)

commands.name: referrer
commands.description: Commands related to referrers

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists the referrers to a manifest

commands.name: repo
commands.description: Commands related to container repositories

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists the repositories contained in the container registry

commands.name: tag
commands.description: Commands related to container image tags

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists the tag contained in the container repository

commands.name: settings
commands.description: Commands related to Dredge settings

commands.name: open
commands.description: Opens the Dredge settings file

commands.name: get
commands.description: Gets the value of the specified setting

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: Name of the setting to set

commands.name: set
commands.description: Sets the specified setting name to a value

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: Name of the setting to set

arguments.name: value
arguments.description: Value to assign to the setting

commands.name: clear-cache
commands.description: Deletes the cached files used by Dredge
